title: phyllanthus urceolatus
intro: Phyllanthus urceolatus, also known as the small-fruit tree or small-fruit phyllanthus, is a plant species native to Australia and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, including liver and kidney diseases, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus urceolatus include its ability to improve liver function, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
